title: Clean plastic trim and fittings of vehicles
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Clean plastic trim and fittings of vehicles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to clean plastic trim and fittings

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Cleaning materials are selected according to vehicle and product manufacturer recommendations and workplace procedures1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Cleaning equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), is selected and checked for serviceability1.5 Work is planned to identify manual or machine methods for cleaning plastic trim and fittings, minimise waste, and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Cleaning materials are selected according to vehicle and product manufacturer recommendations and workplace procedures1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Cleaning equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), is selected and checked for serviceability1.5 Work is planned to identify manual or machine methods for cleaning plastic trim and fittings, minimise waste, and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Cleaning materials are selected according to vehicle and product manufacturer recommendations and workplace procedures1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Cleaning equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), is selected and checked for serviceability1.5 Work is planned to identify manual or machine methods for cleaning plastic trim and fittings, minimise waste, and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to clean plastic trim and fittings

elements.title: Carry out cleaning activities

pcs.text: Cleaning materials are prepared and applied according to workplace procedures, safety data sheet (SDS) information, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Plastic trim and fittings are cleaned according to workplace instructions and customer requirements, and without causing damage to vehicle or components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Cleaning materials are prepared and applied according to workplace procedures, safety data sheet (SDS) information, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Plastic trim and fittings are cleaned according to workplace instructions and customer requirements, and without causing damage to vehicle or components?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out cleaning activities

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored3.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
